name: @xnetjs/server
description: Bring-your-own-backend server kit for XNet React: a framework-agnostic structured-query executor + mutation engine over a server-side NodeStore, with developer auth hooks (authenticate / authorizeRead / authorizeWrite) replacing UCAN/DID, and a trust spectrum (server | custodial | signed) for how end-user identity maps onto signed changes (exploration 0223).
